Spanning the entire second and third floors, this massive 6-bedroom setup gives everyone the perfect balance of social space and study privacy. With 2 full living rooms and 2 complete kitchens, you can completely forget about the typical student housing headaches. No fighting over fridge space, no waiting around to prep breakfast before an early exam, and plenty of room to hang out on your own terms. Why You’ll Love It Here: Space to Breathe: 6 spacious bedrooms split across two levels, giving everyone their own private retreat. Double the Amenities: 2 living rooms and 2 kitchens mean double the convenience and plenty of room to entertain. 4 Full Bathrooms: Say goodbye to morning traffic jams before class. Unbeatable Location: Roll out of bed and be on campus in minutes. Save time and money on commuting. Responsive Management: Have peace of mind knowing you have landlords who genuinely care about the property and the people living in it. The Details: Rent: $4,198 per month (incredible value when split among roommates!) Move-in Date: August 28th — right in time for the new academic year. Bonus: Your application fee will be applied directly toward your first month's rent when you sign a lease! Call show contact info

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 1642 S Broad St #1 - Available 09/01 Welcome to 1642 S Broad St #1, Philadelphia, PA 19145—a modern bi-level apartment that epitomizes both style and convenience. This beautifully renovated two-bedroom, two-bathroom residence features elegant recessed lighting and luxurious white quartz countertops, enhancing its sophisticated and inviting atmosphere. The corner property design ensures abundant natural light through numerous windows, while central air and heating provide year-round comfort. Step outside to your private deck, an ideal space for entertaining, relaxing, or cultivating plants. Location is a standout feature of this apartment. You'll enjoy easy access to public transportation, simplifying your commute and exploration of the city. For cultural enthusiasts, the Kimmel Center is just a short distance away, offering world-class performances and events. Nearby parks provide green space for outdoor activities and relaxation. Food lovers will appreciate being close to iconic local spots like Geno’s Steaks, Pat’s Steaks, and Chickie’s & Pete’s. Additionally, the Avenue of the Arts and the Sports Complex are within easy reach, providing a vibrant mix of cultural and entertainment options. This exceptional apartment offers a perfect blend of modern amenities, a prime location, and a vibrant neighborhood. Don’t miss out on making this your new home!

craigslist.title: Get More Bang For Your Buck!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Experience luxury, comfort, and maintenance-free living in one of Chester County's most sought-after communities. Nestled within the prestigious Cherry Creek community, this beautifully appointed Amherst Model 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath carriage home offers over 3500 square feet of finished living space and an exceptional blend of timeless elegance, generous living spaces, and an unbeatable location within the highly acclaimed West Chester Area School District, including Bayard Rustin High School. A charming private gated courtyard welcomes you home and leads to a gracious foyer, setting the tone for the elegant finishes found throughout. Rich Brazilian Cherry hardwood flooring, extensive custom trim, oversized moldings, and exceptional craftsmanship create a warm yet sophisticated atmosphere from the moment you enter. Designed for both comfortable everyday living and effortless entertaining, the main level features an elegant formal living room, spacious dining room with a built-in butler's pantry, a convenient powder room, and a large family room centered around a beautiful fireplace. Sliding glass doors open to an expansive rear deck overlooking scenic protected open space, providing the perfect setting for morning coffee, outdoor dining, or relaxing evenings. The gourmet eat-in kitchen is equally impressive, showcasing granite countertops, rich cherry cabinetry, premium stainless steel appliances, a breakfast bar, generous pantry, and a sunny breakfast area with sliding doors leading to the private courtyard. Interior access to the attached two-car garage adds everyday convenience. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite offers a true private retreat featuring an elegant tray ceiling, a separate office enclosed by French doors, dual walk-in closets, and a spa-inspired bath complete with a double vanity, soaking tub, and oversized tiled walk-in shower. A bright hallway with large windows overlooking the courtyard leads to two additional spacious bedrooms, a beautifully appointed full hall bathroom, and a conveniently located second-floor laundry room. The finished lower level provides exceptional flexibility with a large recreation room ideal for a media room, fitness area, playroom, or additional lounge space, while abundant unfinished storage accommodates all of your organizational needs. Residents of Cherry Creek enjoy beautifully maintained grounds featuring approximately 80 acres of protected open space, scenic walking trails, sidewalks, natural wetlands, and picturesque green spaces originally planned in partnership with the Brandywine Conservancy. The community offers a peaceful, park-like setting while remaining just minutes from everyday conveniences. Ideally located with quick access to Routes 1, 202, and 322, this home is only minutes from vibrant Downtown West Chester, where you'll enjoy award-winning restaurants, boutique shopping, coffee houses, seasonal festivals, parks, and year-round entertainment. Nearby shopping destinations include Wegmans, Trader Joe's, Whole Foods, and numerous additional retail and dining options. This exceptional residence offers the rare opportunity to lease a luxury home that perfectly combines elegant finishes, spacious interiors, scenic surroundings, and an outstanding location. Enjoy an elevated lifestyle in one of Chester County's premier carriage home communities. To see the home at 16 Oak Leaf Lane or for more information please call Jim Stahelek at show contact info . Listing courtesy of The Paul Lott Group: KELLER WILLIAMS REAL ESTATE WEST CHESTER
